data.title: Emmanuel Macron Has Sharp Words For Israel's PM: 'Mr. Netanyahu  Must Not Forget That His Country Was Created By A UN Decision'
data.description: French President Emmanuel Macron warned Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu not to disregard UN resolutions, reminding him that Israel was created by a UN decision, amid rising tensions with Hezbollah.
